} } /* ---------------------------------------------- * Generated by Animista on 2026-4-27 21:7:16 * Licensed under FreeBSD License. * See http://animista.net/license for more info. * w: http://animista.net, t: @cssanimista * ---------------------------------------------- */ /** * ---------------------------------------- * animation bg-pan-left * ---------------------------------------- */ @-webkit-keyframes bg-pan-left { 0% { background-position: 100% 50%; } 100% { background-position: 0% 50%; } } @keyframes bg-pan-left { 0% { background-position: 100% 50%; } 100% { background-position: 0% 50%; } }
